mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS creator_name, u.role AS creator_role FROM ticket_reply r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.creator_id = u.id WHERE r.ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time ASC
SELECT r.*, u.real_name AS creator_name, u.role AS creator_role FROM ticket_reply r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.creator_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_reply (ticket_id, parent_id, content, creator_id, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{creatorId}, #{isDeleted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_reply SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ticket_reply SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
UPDATE ticket_reply SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
